title: Settings
subtitleAgency: Customize your agency's branding and preferences
sellerNotice: As a seller, you can only edit your personal profile. To change agency settings, contact your administrator.

agencySelector.title: Select Agency
agencySelector.descriptionOwner: Choose which agency you want to configure
agencySelector.descriptionAdmin: Choose an agency from your tenant

branding.title: Agency Branding
branding.description: Customize how your agency appears in quotes and communications
branding.logoHint: Recommended size: 200x200px, PNG or JPG format (max 2MB)
branding.selectAgencyForTemplates: Please select an agency to manage PDF templates

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.description: This information will appear on your quotes and communications
contact.pdfFooterPlaceholder: E.g.: Address, tax ID, website, terms...
contact.pdfFooterHint: This text will appear at the bottom of PDFs generated by your agency

account.title: Account Information
account.description: Your role and permissions in the system

roles.owner: Platform Owner - Access to every tenant
roles.superAdmin: Tenant Admin - Access to every agency in your tenant

account.emailLocked: Email cannot be changed. Contact support if you need to update it.

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.imageTooLarge: The image must be smaller than 2MB
